reviews.review_title: So I played it, and boy did I get scared
reviews.review_description: Solicitude Wake-up is a great horror game, that can definitely spook you for sure. I played about 20 minutes of the game so far and I am liking it a lot! The graphics definitely can be a bit better, but the game is great for what it's trying to do, and it's price. I'm still a bit confused on where to go and how to find new keycards, but hey, that's exploration, right? heheh.  I will go back and play this game even more, because I genuinely like it, but i'd give it a solid 8.5/10 so far. Visuals ok, audio is great, spooks are out of this world, animation is alright, some bugs here and there, but nothing too game-breaking. I've already uploaded multiple videos on this game, and you should check them out over on: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4ItZYo3Q2E_CWkmAngE2VQ ;)
So uh what was that about vr not bring immersive?

This is Scary done right! 

Watch this title!

reviews.review_title: It's even scarier than you think it is..
reviews.review_description:
It's the atmosphere tgat gets you and Solicitude is an accurate word to describe it, its tense, its dark, its disorientating.

There scares that just come from no where but there's story and lore here to, if you like horror you'll be right at home here

I did a full video on it you can view it with the link below or just head over to 
'Eyes on VR' on YouTube 

https://youtu.be/xCl6ZPzXhvY

Plenty if gameplay included.

Well.. I support.

I think you can do super better.

I know it’s an Applab title, so I guess it’s ok. The sounds are pretty scary.

The ambient it’s ok, although maybe too much dark.

This game is difficult.
Even if the flashlight is turned on, the visibility is poor and the battery limit is strict.
I didn't even know how to avoid the aliens.
After all, I died many times and couldn't proceed with the game, so I gave up.

This game has potential to be really cool like a VR resident evil but it is way to dark to see anything and sometimes when the monsters appear in the corner of the room theu do nothing I could walk up to him
And stroke his face with my hand and say “well aren’t you a scary thing” and then he would just disappear but graphics are dope and the facility is cool and well designed. I think once they get everything worked out though this will be a top tier game it’s just not there yet but as it is , it is not a bad game at all just a little quirky.
It's a good game  its so scarry  I love playing it

It’s a great game! But the only thing that is a bummer is when you “die” by being caught but the monsters and you are out back into the main room with the same batteries you died with. I had no batteries left and the big dude got me at the stairs and then I ended up back with no batteries and they weren’t replenished. Kind of made me not want to continue, more so because it was dark and I was just a teeny bit scared HA! But apart from that wish it was easier to find more keycards for the other rooms but I guess that was up the stairs. Still getting used to the game but it’s definitely got a creepy vibe and is good for short game play. Probably not something I would spend hours playing at one time.
